data.content: Scope refinement is enabled by default in src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160, and getScopeRefinementAgent() falls back to the first registered agent or literal "claude" when no scope-refinement mapping or pool is configured in src/lib/settings.ts:529-533 and src/lib/settings.ts:598-615. That makes existing installs auto-dispatch a real agent on beat creation without explicit user opt-in.
